arts.ttl: How much will Arsenal miss Saliba against Liverpool?
arts.sum: Arsenal's 2-0 defeat at AFC Bournemouth has ramped up pressure on Mikel Arteta's side, ahead of their big Premier League clash with leaders Liverpool on Sunday. First, Saliba has the best success rate for tackles on dribblers in the Premier League this season, with 90 per cent.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: RB Leipzig vs. Liverpool
arts.sum: Official team news has just been released for Die Roten Bullen who welcome English giants Liverpool to the Leipzig Arena in Eastern Germany for Matchday 3 of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester City have now joined Manchester United and Arne Slot in race to sign special £83m talent
Darwin Nunez and two more changes as Arne Slot picks strong Liverpool team in Leipzig
arts.sum: Full Liverpool team news and starting line-up for the UEFA Champions League clash at RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Arne Slot dealt major Liverpool concern before Arsenal Premier League title race clash
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news with Arne Slot facing several decisions before the Premier League clash away at Arsenal

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'could battle Liverpool' for signature of highly-rated centre-back
arts.sum: Barcelona allegedly identify Sevilla centre-back Loic Bade as a transfer target, joining Liverpool in the race to sign the Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Will Liverpool look to bring in a midfielder in January despite Curtis Jones, Ryan Gravenberch displays? Transfer expert view
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch believes that Liverpool could still be in the market for a midfielder despite the form of players like Curtis Jones and Ryan Gravenberch.

arts.ttl: Pep Lijnders five-word verdict on new Liverpool boss Arne Slot speaks volumes
arts.sum: Pep Lijnders was Jurgen Klopp's right-hand man at Liverpool, and the Dutchman has been enthused by what he's seen during the early months of Arne Slot's reign at Anfield

arts.ttl: Revealed: Federico Chiesa absence explained as Arne Slot leaves star out of Liverpool squad for RB Leipzig trip - with £12.5m signing having played just 78 minutes
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot confirmed Chiesa had been left out of his squad for their Champions League match with RB Leipzig, after also missing the Reds last two Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: What Jurgen Klopp's new job will involve as Liverpool icon's RB Leipzig controversy explained
arts.sum: Former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp will become Red Bull's head of global soccer in the new year after leaving the Reds in the summer
